text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I guess it's finally happening... The Wakagoma
Stakes...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I didn't expect to compete with Teio this early on.
choice_data_list: Nothing to do now but try!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Try, huh?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, maybe that's not such a bad idea. I've got
the fire of the downtown shopping district in me—

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Hm? Do you hear that?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Phew! I'm here! I made it in time!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Wait, huh?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: What... what are you doing here?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hey, Nature! It's been a minute, hasn't it?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: But uhhh... why are you in my waiting room?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Excuse me?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oh, I get it! You wanted to chat with me! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Wait, this is my waiting room! Didn't you see the sign on the door?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oh, right. It says "Nice Nature!"

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Seriously... You almost gave me a heart attack.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: My bad! Maybe I'm too excited!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: You know why? Because my reign starts here!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Of course, I intend to beat you all by a mile! The crowd is waiting to see me cross the finish line!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oops! I shouldn't stay too long!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Anyways, good luck! Later!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: "The crowd is waiting," huh?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: What do you mean?
choice_data_list: Hearing that right before the race is, well...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ah, you think that stirred me up? Thanks for your
concern.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I'm totally fine. See, Teio is always that way, and
why wouldn't she be? After all...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Main characters don't look back. Us side
characters aren't even in their sight.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I thought I already understood that, but she really
drove it home just now.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Urghhhh!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I don't know about taking on challenges and
stuff, but...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I guess I'll go make my obligatory appearance in
Ms. Main Character's story.
